def extract_images_with_positions(article_soup, article_url, content_div=None):
    """
    提取文章中的所有图片及其位置信息

    Args:
        article_soup: BeautifulSoup对象
        article_url: 文章URL（用于解析相对路径）
        content_div: 可选的正文区域，如果为None则搜索整个页面

    Returns:
        list: 图片信息列表，每个元素包含：
            - url: 图片URL
            - index: 图片索引（顺序）
            - context: 上下文信息（前后文本）
            - element: 原始img元素（用于位置标记）
    """
    from urllib.parse import urljoin
    import re

    images = []

    # 决定搜索范围
    if content_div:
        img_elements = content_div.find_all('img')
        search_scope = 'content'
    else:
        img_elements = article_soup.find_all('img')
        search_scope = 'full_page'

    print(f"在{search_scope}范围找到 {len(img_elements)} 个img元素")

    for idx, img in enumerate(img_elements):
        # 提取图片URL
        img_url = None
        for attr in ('src', 'data-src', 'data-lazy-src', 'data-original'):
            url = img.get(attr)
            if url:
                url = url.strip()
                if url and not url.startswith(('data:', 'javascript:', '#')):
                    img_url = urljoin(article_url, url)
                    break

        if not img_url:
            continue

        # 过滤非文章图片
        img_url_lower = img_url.lower()
        exclude_patterns = [
            '/avatar/', '/logo/', '/ad/', '/ads/', '/banner/', '/sponsor/',
            '/widget/', '/icon/', '/favicon', '/social/', '/share/',
            'gravatar.com', 'avatar.jpg', 'logo.png', 'placeholder'
        ]
        if any(pattern in img_url_lower for pattern in exclude_patterns):
            continue

        # 获取上下文信息
        context = ""
        try:
            # 获取前一个文本节点
            prev_elem = img.find_previous_sibling(string=True)
            if prev_elem:
                prev_text = str(prev_elem).strip()[:50]
                if prev_text:
                    context += f"前: {prev_text} "

            # 获取后一个文本节点
            next_elem = img.find_next_sibling(string=True)
            if next_elem:
                next_text = str(next_elem).strip()[:50]
                if next_text:
                    context += f"后: {next_text}"
        except:
            context = "无法获取上下文"

        images.append({
            'url': img_url,
            'index': idx,
            'context': context.strip(),
            'element': img,
            'original_html': str(img)
        })

    print(f"提取到 {len(images)} 张文章图片")
    return images

def mark_image_positions(content_div, images):
    """
    在HTML内容中用占位符标记图片位置

    Args:
        content_div: BeautifulSoup对象（正文区域）
        images: 图片信息列表

    Returns:
        str: 带有图片位置标记的HTML字符串
    """
    # 创建副本以避免修改原始对象
    import copy
    marked_div = copy.copy(content_div)

    # 为每张图片添加唯一占位符
    for img_info in images:
        img = img_info['element']
        # 在marked_div中找到对应的img元素
        # 由于我们复制了div，需要找到相同位置的img
        # 简单方法：用占位符替换
        placeholder = f"{{{{IMAGE_PLACEHOLDER_{img_info['index']}}}}}"
        img.replace_with(placeholder)

    return str(marked_div)

#!/usr/bin/env python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""
byhand-digest 技能的核心抓取脚本
由 Claude Code 按需调用，执行时不占用主会话上下文
"""

import os
import re
import sys
import requests
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup
from datetime import datetime
from urllib.parse import urljoin
import hashlib
from pathlib import Path
try:
    import trafilatura
    TRAFILATURA_AVAILABLE = True
except ImportError:
    TRAFILATURA_AVAILABLE = False
    print("警告: trafilatura 库未安装，使用备用方法提取内容")
    print("请运行: pip install trafilatura")

# ===== 配置 =====
TARGET_URL = "https://www.byhand.ai/"
ARCHIVE_URL = "https://www.byhand.ai/archive"   # 归档页面，包含所有文章
OBSIDIAN_VAULT = r"E:\Obsidian Vault"           # 用户指定的目录
IMAGE_SAVE_DIR = os.path.join(OBSIDIAN_VAULT, "images", "byhand")
SUMMARY_LENGTH = 300

def extract_title_from_url(url_path):
    """
    从URL路径中提取文章标题
    例如: /p/ppo-clipped-policy-loss-algorithm -> "PPO Clipped Policy Loss Algorithm"
    """
    if not url_path:
        return None

    # 提取/p/之后的部分
    if '/p/' in url_path:
        slug = url_path.split('/p/')[-1]
    else:
        slug = url_path.split('/')[-1]

    # 去除可能的查询参数和末尾斜杠
    slug = slug.split('?')[0].rstrip('/')

    # 将连字符替换为空格
    title = slug.replace('-', ' ')

    # 常见缩写词列表，保持大写
    abbreviations = ['ppo', 'ai', 'rl', 'ml', 'dl', 'nlp', 'cv', 'gan',
                     'transformer', 'bert', 'gpt', 'lstm', 'cnn', 'rnn',
                     'huggingface', 'openai', 'anthropic', 'deepseek',
                     'llm', 'vlm', 'moe', 'mha', 'ffn', 'relu', 'adam',
                     'sgd', 'svm', 'knn', 'pca', 't-sne', 'umap', 'tsne']

    # 将每个单词的首字母大写，但保持缩写词大写
    words = []
    for word in title.split():
        lower_word = word.lower()
        if lower_word in abbreviations:
            words.append(word.upper())  # 保持缩写词大写
        else:
            words.append(word.capitalize())

    return ' '.join(words)

def main():
    print("开始抓取 AI by Hand 最新文章...")
    
    # 确保目录存在
    os.makedirs(IMAGE_SAVE_DIR, exist_ok=True)
    
    # 1. 获取首页
    headers = {'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36'}
    try:
        # 访问归档页面获取所有文章列表
        resp = requests.get(ARCHIVE_URL, headers=headers, timeout=10)
        resp.encoding = 'utf-8'
        resp.raise_for_status()
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"归档页面请求失败: {e}")
        return 1

    # 2. 解析最新文章链接
    soup = BeautifulSoup(resp.text, 'html.parser')
    article_url = None
    title = None

    # 方法1：正则表达式直接查找完整文章URL
    import re
    # 匹配完整URL格式: https://www.byhand.ai/p/文章slug
    # 但不匹配包含/comments的评论页面
    article_urls = re.findall(r'https://www\.byhand\.ai/p/[^"/\'> ]+(?<!comments)', resp.text)
    # 去重
    unique_urls = []
    seen = set()
    for url in article_urls:
        url = url.rstrip('\\')
        if url not in seen:
            seen.add(url)
            unique_urls.append(url)

    print(f"正则表达式找到 {len(unique_urls)} 个文章URL")
    for url in unique_urls[:5]:
        print(f"   {url}")

    if unique_urls:
        # 选择第一个URL作为最新文章（archive页面按时间顺序排列，最新文章在前）
        article_url = unique_urls[0]
        print(f"选择最新文章URL: {article_url}")
        # 标题为空，稍后从文章页面提取
        title = None
    else:
        # 方法2：BeautifulSoup查找
        article_links = []
        for a in soup.find_all('a', href=True):
            href = a['href']
            if '/p/' in href:
                full_url = urljoin(TARGET_URL, href)
                article_links.append((full_url, a.get_text(strip=True)))

        print(f"BeautifulSoup找到 {len(article_links)} 个文章链接")
        if article_links:
            article_url, title = article_links[0]
            print(f"选择最新文章: {title}")
        else:
            # 方法3：第一个非首页链接
            for a in soup.find_all('a', href=True):
                href = a['href']
                if href.startswith('/') and href != '/':
                    article_url = urljoin(TARGET_URL, href)
                    title = a.get_text(strip=True)
                    break

    if not article_url:
        print("未找到文章链接，网站结构可能已变化")
        return 1
    
    print(f"最新文章: {article_url}")
    print(f"标题: {title}")
    
    # 3. 获取文章页
    try:
        article_resp = requests.get(article_url, headers=headers, timeout=10)
        article_resp.encoding = 'utf-8'
        article_resp.raise_for_status()
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"文章页请求失败: {e}")
        return 1
    
    article_soup = BeautifulSoup(article_resp.text, 'html.parser')

    # 如果标题为空，从文章页面提取标题
    if not title:
        # 尝试多种方法提取文章标题
        title = None

        # 方法1：查找 <title data-rh="true"> 标签（最高优先级）
        title_data_rh = article_soup.find('title', {'data-rh': 'true'})
        if title_data_rh:
            title = title_data_rh.get_text(strip=True)
            print(f"从<title data-rh='true'>提取标题: {title}")

        # 方法2：查找 meta property="og:title"
        if not title:
            og_title = article_soup.find('meta', property='og:title')
            if og_title and og_title.get('content'):
                title = og_title.get('content')
                print(f"从og:title提取标题: {title}")

        # 方法3：查找 title 元素
        if not title:
            title_elem = article_soup.find('title')
            if title_elem:
                title = title_elem.get_text(strip=True)
                print(f"从title提取标题: {title}")

        # 方法4：查找 h1 元素
        if not title:
            h1_elements = article_soup.find_all('h1')
            if h1_elements:
                print(f"找到 {len(h1_elements)} 个 h1 元素:")
                for i, h1 in enumerate(h1_elements):
                    text = h1.get_text(strip=True)
                    print(f"  h1[{i}]: {text}")
            for h1 in h1_elements:
                text = h1.get_text(strip=True)
                if text and len(text) > 5:
                    # 选择最长的h1作为文章标题（通常文章标题更长）
                    if not title or len(text) > len(title):
                        title = text
            if title:
                print(f"从h1选择标题: {title}")

        # 方法5：查找特定类名的标题元素
        if not title:
            for class_name in ['post-title', 'article-title', 'entry-title', 'title']:
                title_elem = article_soup.find(class_=class_name)
                if title_elem:
                    title = title_elem.get_text(strip=True)
                    print(f"从{class_name}类提取标题: {title}")
                    break

        if not title:
            title = "未命名文章"
            print("未找到文章标题，使用默认标题")

    # 4. 提取正文内容
    article_text = ""
    article_md = ""
    md_content = []

    # 方法1：使用 trafilatura 提取内容（如果可用）
    if TRAFILATURA_AVAILABLE:
        try:
            print("尝试使用 trafilatura 提取文章内容...")
            # 下载页面内容
            downloaded = trafilatura.fetch_url(article_url)
            if downloaded:
                # 提取markdown格式内容
                article_md = trafilatura.extract(downloaded, output_format='markdown')
                if article_md:
                    print("trafilatura 成功提取markdown格式内容")
                    # 提取纯文本用于摘要
                    article_text = trafilatura.extract(downloaded, output_format='txt')
                    # 将markdown内容分割为段落
                    md_content = [para + "\n\n" for para in article_md.split('\n\n') if para.strip()]
                else:
                    print("trafilatura 提取markdown内容失败，尝试文本格式")
                    article_text = trafilatura.extract(downloaded, output_format='txt')
                    if article_text:
                        print("trafilatura 成功提取文本格式内容")
                        md_content = [para + "\n\n" for para in article_text.split('\n\n') if para.strip()]
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"trafilatura 提取失败: {e}")
            # 重置变量以确保使用备用方法
            article_md = ""
            article_text = ""
            md_content = []

    # 方法2：如果 trafilatura 不可用或提取失败，使用 BeautifulSoup 备用方法
    if not md_content and not article_text:
        print("使用 BeautifulSoup 备用方法提取内容...")
        content_div = None
        # 尝试多种选择器
        selectors = [
            {'name': 'div[class*="post-content"]', 'func': lambda s: s.find('div', class_=re.compile(r'post-content'))},
            {'name': 'div[class*="content"]', 'func': lambda s: s.find('div', class_=re.compile(r'content'))},
            {'name': 'div[class*="article"]', 'func': lambda s: s.find('div', class_=re.compile(r'article'))},
            {'name': 'div[class*="entry"]', 'func': lambda s: s.find('div', class_=re.compile(r'entry'))},
            {'name': 'article', 'func': lambda s: s.find('article')},
            {'name': 'div[class*="body"]', 'func': lambda s: s.find('div', class_=re.compile(r'body'))},
            {'name': 'main', 'func': lambda s: s.find('main')},
            {'name': 'body', 'func': lambda s: s.find('body')},
        ]

        for selector in selectors:
            content_div = selector['func'](article_soup)
            if content_div:
                print(f"使用选择器 {selector['name']} 找到正文区域")
                break

        if not content_div:
            print("无法提取正文")
            return 1

        # 5. 处理图片：下载并替换为本地引用（仅BeautifulSoup方法需要）
        for img in content_div.find_all('img'):
            img_url = img.get('src')
            if not img_url:
                continue
            img_url = urljoin(article_url, img_url)

            # 生成文件名并下载
            img_filename = hashlib.md5(img_url.encode()).hexdigest() + '.jpg'
            local_path = os.path.join(IMAGE_SAVE_DIR, img_filename)

            try:
                img_data = requests.get(img_url, timeout=10).content
                with open(local_path, 'wb') as f:
                    f.write(img_data)
                # 替换为 Obsidian 格式
                img.replace_with(f"![[images/byhand/{img_filename}]]\n")
                print(f"图片已保存: {img_filename}")
            except Exception as e:
                print(f"图片下载失败 {img_url}: {e}")
                # 保留原链接或移除
                img.decompose()

        # 提取纯文本用于摘要
        article_text = content_div.get_text()

        # 生成 Markdown 内容
        md_content = []
        # 收集所有段落文本
        for p in content_div.find_all('p'):
            text = p.get_text(strip=True)
            if text:
                md_content.append(text + "\n\n")
        # 图片引用已经在content_div中作为字符串，不需要额外添加

    # 6. 生成摘要
    if article_text:
        summary = article_text[:SUMMARY_LENGTH] + "..." if len(article_text) > SUMMARY_LENGTH else article_text
    elif md_content:
        # 从md_content生成摘要文本
        summary_text = " ".join([para.strip() for para in md_content[:3]])
        summary = summary_text[:SUMMARY_LENGTH] + "..." if len(summary_text) > SUMMARY_LENGTH else summary_text
    else:
        summary = "无法提取文章内容"
    
    # 8. 保存笔记
    safe_title = re.sub(r'[\\/*?:"<>|]', "", title)[:50]  # 限制长度
    today = datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d")
    filename = f"{today}-{safe_title}.md"
    filepath = os.path.join(OBSIDIAN_VAULT, filename)
    
    note = f"""---
title: {title}
date: {today}
source: {article_url}
---

# {title}

##  摘要
{summary}

##  正文
{''.join(md_content)}
"""
    with open(filepath, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        f.write(note)
    
    print(f"笔记已生成: {filepath}")
    
    # 输出给 Claude 的结果（会被捕获）
    print(f"RESULT_FILE={filepath}")
    return 0

if __name__ == "__main__":
    sys.exit(main())

        # 5. 提取图片信息（使用新方法）
        print("提取图片信息...")
        images = extract_images_with_positions(article_soup, article_url, content_div)

        # 6. 下载图片
        local_images = []
        if images:
            local_images = download_and_replace_images(images, title)
            print(f"下载了 {len(local_images)} 张图片")

        # 7. 生成带图片位置的Markdown内容
        print("生成Markdown内容...")
        md_content = []

        # 使用占位符标记图片位置，然后转换为markdown
        if images and local_images:
            # 创建图片占位符映射
            placeholder_map = {}
            for img_info in local_images:
                placeholder_map[img_info['placeholder']] = img_info['obsidian_ref']

            # 用占位符替换图片元素
            for img_info in images:
                img = img_info['element']
                placeholder = img_info['placeholder'] = f"{{{{IMAGE_PLACEHOLDER_{img_info['index']}}}}}"
                img.replace_with(f"\n\n{placeholder}\n\n")

        # 提取所有文本内容（包括占位符）
        # 遍历所有段落和文本节点
        for element in content_div.descendants:
            if element.name is None:  # 文本节点
                text = str(element).strip()
                if text:
                    md_content.append(text + "\n\n")
            elif element.name == 'p':
                text = element.get_text(strip=True)
                if text:
                    md_content.append(text + "\n\n")
            elif element.name in ['h1', 'h2', 'h3', 'h4', 'h5', 'h6']:
                level = int(element.name[1])
                heading_text = element.get_text(strip=True)
                if heading_text:
                    md_content.append(f"{'#' * level} {heading_text}\n\n")
            elif element.name == 'li':
                text = element.get_text(strip=True)
                if text:
                    md_content.append(f"- {text}\n\n")
            elif element.name in ['ul', 'ol', 'div', 'span']:
                # 这些元素已经通过后代处理，跳过
                pass

        # 提取纯文本用于摘要
        article_text = content_div.get_text()
        print(f"提取到 {len(md_content)} 个markdown段落")

#!/usr/bin/env python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""
byhand-digest 技能的核心抓取脚本
由 Claude Code 按需调用，执行时不占用主会话上下文
"""

import os
import re
import sys
import requests
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup
from datetime import datetime
from urllib.parse import urljoin
import hashlib
from pathlib import Path
try:
    import trafilatura
    TRAFILATURA_AVAILABLE = True
except ImportError:
    TRAFILATURA_AVAILABLE = False
    print("警告: trafilatura 库未安装，使用备用方法提取内容")
    print("请运行: pip install trafilatura")

# ===== 配置 =====
TARGET_URL = "https://www.byhand.ai/"
ARCHIVE_URL = "https://www.byhand.ai/archive"   # 归档页面，包含所有文章
OBSIDIAN_VAULT = r"E:\Obsidian Vault"           # 用户指定的目录
IMAGE_SAVE_DIR = os.path.join(OBSIDIAN_VAULT, "images", "byhand")
SUMMARY_LENGTH = 300

def extract_title_from_url(url_path):
    """
    从URL路径中提取文章标题
    例如: /p/ppo-clipped-policy-loss-algorithm -> "PPO Clipped Policy Loss Algorithm"
    """
    if not url_path:
        return None

    # 提取/p/之后的部分
    if '/p/' in url_path:
        slug = url_path.split('/p/')[-1]
    else:
        slug = url_path.split('/')[-1]

    # 去除可能的查询参数和末尾斜杠
    slug = slug.split('?')[0].rstrip('/')

    # 将连字符替换为空格
    title = slug.replace('-', ' ')

    # 常见缩写词列表，保持大写
    abbreviations = ['ppo', 'ai', 'rl', 'ml', 'dl', 'nlp', 'cv', 'gan',
                     'transformer', 'bert', 'gpt', 'lstm', 'cnn', 'rnn',
                     'huggingface', 'openai', 'anthropic', 'deepseek',
                     'llm', 'vlm', 'moe', 'mha', 'ffn', 'relu', 'adam',
                     'sgd', 'svm', 'knn', 'pca', 't-sne', 'umap', 'tsne']

    # 将每个单词的首字母大写，但保持缩写词大写
    words = []
    for word in title.split():
        lower_word = word.lower()
        if lower_word in abbreviations:
            words.append(word.upper())  # 保持缩写词大写
        else:
            words.append(word.capitalize())

    return ' '.join(words)

def extract_images_with_positions(article_soup, article_url, content_div=None):
    """
    提取文章中的所有图片及其位置信息

    Args:
        article_soup: BeautifulSoup对象
        article_url: 文章URL（用于解析相对路径）
        content_div: 可选的正文区域，如果为None则搜索整个页面

    Returns:
        list: 图片信息列表，每个元素包含：
            - url: 图片URL
            - index: 图片索引（顺序）
            - context: 上下文信息（前后文本）
            - element: 原始img元素（用于位置标记）
    """
    from urllib.parse import urljoin
    import re

    images = []

    # 决定搜索范围
    if content_div:
        img_elements = content_div.find_all('img')
        search_scope = 'content'
    else:
        img_elements = article_soup.find_all('img')
        search_scope = 'full_page'

    print(f"在{search_scope}范围找到 {len(img_elements)} 个img元素")

    for idx, img in enumerate(img_elements):
        # 提取图片URL
        img_url = None
        for attr in ('src', 'data-src', 'data-lazy-src', 'data-original'):
            url = img.get(attr)
            if url:
                url = url.strip()
                if url and not url.startswith(('data:', 'javascript:', '#')):
                    img_url = urljoin(article_url, url)
                    break

        if not img_url:
            continue

        # 过滤非文章图片
        img_url_lower = img_url.lower()
        exclude_patterns = [
            '/avatar/', '/logo/', '/ad/', '/ads/', '/banner/', '/sponsor/',
            '/widget/', '/icon/', '/favicon', '/social/', '/share/',
            'gravatar.com', 'avatar.jpg', 'logo.png', 'placeholder'
        ]
        if any(pattern in img_url_lower for pattern in exclude_patterns):
            continue

        # 获取上下文信息
        context = ""
        try:
            # 获取前一个文本节点
            prev_elem = img.find_previous_sibling(string=True)
            if prev_elem:
                prev_text = str(prev_elem).strip()[:50]
                if prev_text:
                    context += f"前: {prev_text} "

            # 获取后一个文本节点
            next_elem = img.find_next_sibling(string=True)
            if next_elem:
                next_text = str(next_elem).strip()[:50]
                if next_text:
                    context += f"后: {next_text}"
        except:
            context = "无法获取上下文"

        images.append({
            'url': img_url,
            'index': idx,
            'context': context.strip(),
            'element': img,
            'original_html': str(img)
        })

    print(f"提取到 {len(images)} 张文章图片")
    return images

def mark_image_positions(content_div, images):
    """
    在HTML内容中用占位符标记图片位置

    Args:
        content_div: BeautifulSoup对象（正文区域）
        images: 图片信息列表

    Returns:
        str: 带有图片位置标记的HTML字符串
    """
    # 创建副本以避免修改原始对象
    import copy
    marked_div = copy.copy(content_div)

    # 为每张图片添加唯一占位符
    for img_info in images:
        img = img_info['element']
        # 在marked_div中找到对应的img元素
        # 由于我们复制了div，需要找到相同位置的img
        # 简单方法：用占位符替换
        placeholder = f"{{{{IMAGE_PLACEHOLDER_{img_info['index']}}}}}"
        img.replace_with(placeholder)

    return str(marked_div)

def download_and_replace_images(images, article_title):
    """
    下载图片并生成Obsidian引用

    Args:
        images: 图片信息列表
        article_title: 文章标题（用于创建文件夹）

    Returns:
        list: 本地图片信息列表，包含obsidian_ref
    """
    import os
    import hashlib
    import requests
    from datetime import datetime

    local_images = []

    # 创建文章特定的图片文件夹
    safe_title = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\-]', '', article_title, flags=re.UNICODE)
    safe_title = safe_title.strip()
    if not safe_title:
        safe_title = "未命名文章"
    safe_title = re.sub(r'\s+', '_', safe_title)[:30]

    date_str = datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d")
    title_hash = hashlib.md5(article_title.encode()).hexdigest()[:6]
    article_folder = f"{date_str}_{safe_title}_{title_hash}"

    article_image_dir = os.path.join(IMAGE_SAVE_DIR, article_folder)
    os.makedirs(article_image_dir, exist_ok=True)

    print(f"图片保存目录: {article_image_dir}")

    headers = {'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36'}

    for img_info in images:
        img_url = img_info['url']
        try:
            img_res = requests.get(img_url, headers=headers, timeout=10)
            if img_res.status_code == 200:
                # 生成文件名
                img_hash = hashlib.md5(img_url.encode()).hexdigest()
                content_type = img_res.headers.get('Content-Type', '')
                if 'jpeg' in content_type or 'jpg' in content_type:
                    ext = '.jpg'
                elif 'png' in content_type:
                    ext = '.png'
                elif 'gif' in content_type:
                    ext = '.gif'
                elif 'webp' in content_type:
                    ext = '.webp'
                else:
                    ext = '.jpg'

                filename = f"{img_hash}{ext}"
                local_path = os.path.join(article_image_dir, filename)

                with open(local_path, 'wb') as f:
                    f.write(img_res.content)

                # Obsidian引用路径
                obsidian_ref = f"![[images/byhand/{article_folder}/{filename}]]"

                local_images.append({
                    'url': img_url,
                    'local_path': local_path,
                    'obsidian_ref': obsidian_ref,
                    'index': img_info['index'],
                    'context': img_info['context'],
                    'filename': filename,
                    'placeholder': f"{{{{IMAGE_PLACEHOLDER_{img_info['index']}}}}}"
                })

                print(f"图片下载成功: {filename} (索引: {img_info['index']})")
            else:
                print(f"图片下载失败，状态码 {img_res.status_code}: {img_url}")
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"图片下载失败 {img_url}: {e}")

    # 按索引排序
    local_images.sort(key=lambda x: x['index'])
    return local_images

def main():
    print("开始抓取 AI by Hand 最新文章...")
    
    # 确保目录存在
    os.makedirs(IMAGE_SAVE_DIR, exist_ok=True)
    
    # 1. 获取首页
    headers = {'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36'}
    try:
        # 访问归档页面获取所有文章列表
        resp = requests.get(ARCHIVE_URL, headers=headers, timeout=10)
        resp.encoding = 'utf-8'
        resp.raise_for_status()
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"归档页面请求失败: {e}")
        return 1

    # 2. 解析最新文章链接
    soup = BeautifulSoup(resp.text, 'html.parser')
    article_url = None
    title = None

    # 方法1：正则表达式直接查找完整文章URL
    import re
    # 匹配完整URL格式: https://www.byhand.ai/p/文章slug
    # 但不匹配包含/comments的评论页面
    article_urls = re.findall(r'https://www\.byhand\.ai/p/[^"/\'> ]+(?<!comments)', resp.text)
    # 去重
    unique_urls = []
    seen = set()
    for url in article_urls:
        url = url.rstrip('\\')
        if url not in seen:
            seen.add(url)
            unique_urls.append(url)

    print(f"正则表达式找到 {len(unique_urls)} 个文章URL")
    for url in unique_urls[:5]:
        print(f"   {url}")

    if unique_urls:
        # 选择第一个URL作为最新文章（archive页面按时间顺序排列，最新文章在前）
        article_url = unique_urls[0]
        print(f"选择最新文章URL: {article_url}")
        # 标题为空，稍后从文章页面提取
        title = None
    else:
        # 方法2：BeautifulSoup查找
        article_links = []
        for a in soup.find_all('a', href=True):
            href = a['href']
            if '/p/' in href:
                full_url = urljoin(TARGET_URL, href)
                article_links.append((full_url, a.get_text(strip=True)))

        print(f"BeautifulSoup找到 {len(article_links)} 个文章链接")
        if article_links:
            article_url, title = article_links[0]
            print(f"选择最新文章: {title}")
        else:
            # 方法3：第一个非首页链接
            for a in soup.find_all('a', href=True):
                href = a['href']
                if href.startswith('/') and href != '/':
                    article_url = urljoin(TARGET_URL, href)
                    title = a.get_text(strip=True)
                    break

    if not article_url:
        print("未找到文章链接，网站结构可能已变化")
        return 1
    
    print(f"最新文章: {article_url}")
    print(f"标题: {title}")
    
    # 3. 获取文章页
    try:
        article_resp = requests.get(article_url, headers=headers, timeout=10)
        article_resp.encoding = 'utf-8'
        article_resp.raise_for_status()
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"文章页请求失败: {e}")
        return 1
    
    article_soup = BeautifulSoup(article_resp.text, 'html.parser')

    # 如果标题为空，从文章页面提取标题
    if not title:
        # 尝试多种方法提取文章标题
        title = None

        # 方法1：查找 <title data-rh="true"> 标签（最高优先级）
        title_data_rh = article_soup.find('title', {'data-rh': 'true'})
        if title_data_rh:
            title = title_data_rh.get_text(strip=True)
            print(f"从<title data-rh='true'>提取标题: {title}")

        # 方法2：查找 meta property="og:title"
        if not title:
            og_title = article_soup.find('meta', property='og:title')
            if og_title and og_title.get('content'):
                title = og_title.get('content')
                print(f"从og:title提取标题: {title}")

        # 方法3：查找 title 元素
        if not title:
            title_elem = article_soup.find('title')
            if title_elem:
                title = title_elem.get_text(strip=True)
                print(f"从title提取标题: {title}")

        # 方法4：查找 h1 元素
        if not title:
            h1_elements = article_soup.find_all('h1')
            if h1_elements:
                print(f"找到 {len(h1_elements)} 个 h1 元素:")
                for i, h1 in enumerate(h1_elements):
                    text = h1.get_text(strip=True)
                    print(f"  h1[{i}]: {text}")
            for h1 in h1_elements:
                text = h1.get_text(strip=True)
                if text and len(text) > 5:
                    # 选择最长的h1作为文章标题（通常文章标题更长）
                    if not title or len(text) > len(title):
                        title = text
            if title:
                print(f"从h1选择标题: {title}")

        # 方法5：查找特定类名的标题元素
        if not title:
            for class_name in ['post-title', 'article-title', 'entry-title', 'title']:
                title_elem = article_soup.find(class_=class_name)
                if title_elem:
                    title = title_elem.get_text(strip=True)
                    print(f"从{class_name}类提取标题: {title}")
                    break

        if not title:
            title = "未命名文章"
            print("未找到文章标题，使用默认标题")

    # 4. 提取正文内容
    article_text = ""
    article_md = ""
    md_content = []

    # 方法1：使用 trafilatura 提取内容（如果可用）
    if TRAFILATURA_AVAILABLE:
        try:
            print("尝试使用 trafilatura 提取文章内容...")
            # 下载页面内容
            downloaded = trafilatura.fetch_url(article_url)
            if downloaded:
                # 提取markdown格式内容
                article_md = trafilatura.extract(downloaded, output_format='markdown')
                if article_md:
                    print("trafilatura 成功提取markdown格式内容")
                    # 提取纯文本用于摘要
                    article_text = trafilatura.extract(downloaded, output_format='txt')
                    # 将markdown内容分割为段落
                    md_content = [para + "\n\n" for para in article_md.split('\n\n') if para.strip()]
                else:
                    print("trafilatura 提取markdown内容失败，尝试文本格式")
                    article_text = trafilatura.extract(downloaded, output_format='txt')
                    if article_text:
                        print("trafilatura 成功提取文本格式内容")
                        md_content = [para + "\n\n" for para in article_text.split('\n\n') if para.strip()]
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"trafilatura 提取失败: {e}")
            # 重置变量以确保使用备用方法
            article_md = ""
            article_text = ""
            md_content = []

    # 方法2：如果 trafilatura 不可用或提取失败，使用 BeautifulSoup 备用方法
    if not md_content and not article_text:
        print("使用 BeautifulSoup 备用方法提取内容...")
        content_div = None
        # 尝试多种选择器
        selectors = [
            {'name': 'div[class*="post-content"]', 'func': lambda s: s.find('div', class_=re.compile(r'post-content'))},
            {'name': 'div[class*="content"]', 'func': lambda s: s.find('div', class_=re.compile(r'content'))},
            {'name': 'div[class*="article"]', 'func': lambda s: s.find('div', class_=re.compile(r'article'))},
            {'name': 'div[class*="entry"]', 'func': lambda s: s.find('div', class_=re.compile(r'entry'))},
            {'name': 'article', 'func': lambda s: s.find('article')},
            {'name': 'div[class*="body"]', 'func': lambda s: s.find('div', class_=re.compile(r'body'))},
            {'name': 'main', 'func': lambda s: s.find('main')},
            {'name': 'body', 'func': lambda s: s.find('body')},
        ]

        for selector in selectors:
            content_div = selector['func'](article_soup)
            if content_div:
                print(f"使用选择器 {selector['name']} 找到正文区域")
                break

        if not content_div:
            print("无法提取正文")
            return 1

        # 5. 处理图片：下载并替换为本地引用（仅BeautifulSoup方法需要）
        for img in content_div.find_all('img'):
            img_url = img.get('src')
            if not img_url:
                continue
            img_url = urljoin(article_url, img_url)

            # 生成文件名并下载
            img_filename = hashlib.md5(img_url.encode()).hexdigest() + '.jpg'
            local_path = os.path.join(IMAGE_SAVE_DIR, img_filename)

            try:
                img_data = requests.get(img_url, timeout=10).content
                with open(local_path, 'wb') as f:
                    f.write(img_data)
                # 替换为 Obsidian 格式
                img.replace_with(f"![[images/byhand/{img_filename}]]\n")
                print(f"图片已保存: {img_filename}")
            except Exception as e:
                print(f"图片下载失败 {img_url}: {e}")
                # 保留原链接或移除
                img.decompose()

        # 提取纯文本用于摘要
        article_text = content_div.get_text()

        # 生成 Markdown 内容
        md_content = []
        # 收集所有段落文本
        for p in content_div.find_all('p'):
            text = p.get_text(strip=True)
            if text:
                md_content.append(text + "\n\n")
        # 图片引用已经在content_div中作为字符串，不需要额外添加

    # 6. 生成摘要
    if article_text:
        summary = article_text[:SUMMARY_LENGTH] + "..." if len(article_text) > SUMMARY_LENGTH else article_text
    elif md_content:
        # 从md_content生成摘要文本
        summary_text = " ".join([para.strip() for para in md_content[:3]])
        summary = summary_text[:SUMMARY_LENGTH] + "..." if len(summary_text) > SUMMARY_LENGTH else summary_text
    else:
        summary = "无法提取文章内容"
    
    # 8. 保存笔记
    safe_title = re.sub(r'[\\/*?:"<>|]', "", title)[:50]  # 限制长度
    today = datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d")
    filename = f"{today}-{safe_title}.md"
    filepath = os.path.join(OBSIDIAN_VAULT, filename)
    
    note = f"""---
title: {title}
date: {today}
source: {article_url}
---

# {title}

##  摘要
{summary}

##  正文
{''.join(md_content)}
"""
    with open(filepath, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        f.write(note)
    
    print(f"笔记已生成: {filepath}")
    
    # 输出给 Claude 的结果（会被捕获）
    print(f"RESULT_FILE={filepath}")
    return 0

if __name__ == "__main__":
    sys.exit(main())

toolUseResult.originalFile:
#!/usr/bin/env python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""
byhand-digest 技能的核心抓取脚本
由 Claude Code 按需调用，执行时不占用主会话上下文
"""

import os
import re
import sys
import requests
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup
from datetime import datetime
from urllib.parse import urljoin
import hashlib
from pathlib import Path
try:
    import trafilatura
    TRAFILATURA_AVAILABLE = True
except ImportError:
    TRAFILATURA_AVAILABLE = False
    print("警告: trafilatura 库未安装，使用备用方法提取内容")
    print("请运行: pip install trafilatura")

# ===== 配置 =====
TARGET_URL = "https://www.byhand.ai/"
ARCHIVE_URL = "https://www.byhand.ai/archive"   # 归档页面，包含所有文章
OBSIDIAN_VAULT = r"E:\Obsidian Vault"           # 用户指定的目录
IMAGE_SAVE_DIR = os.path.join(OBSIDIAN_VAULT, "images", "byhand")
SUMMARY_LENGTH = 300

def extract_title_from_url(url_path):
    """
    从URL路径中提取文章标题
    例如: /p/ppo-clipped-policy-loss-algorithm -> "PPO Clipped Policy Loss Algorithm"
    """
    if not url_path:
        return None

    # 提取/p/之后的部分
    if '/p/' in url_path:
        slug = url_path.split('/p/')[-1]
    else:
        slug = url_path.split('/')[-1]

    # 去除可能的查询参数和末尾斜杠
    slug = slug.split('?')[0].rstrip('/')

    # 将连字符替换为空格
    title = slug.replace('-', ' ')

    # 常见缩写词列表，保持大写
    abbreviations = ['ppo', 'ai', 'rl', 'ml', 'dl', 'nlp', 'cv', 'gan',
                     'transformer', 'bert', 'gpt', 'lstm', 'cnn', 'rnn',
                     'huggingface', 'openai', 'anthropic', 'deepseek',
                     'llm', 'vlm', 'moe', 'mha', 'ffn', 'relu', 'adam',
                     'sgd', 'svm', 'knn', 'pca', 't-sne', 'umap', 'tsne']

    # 将每个单词的首字母大写，但保持缩写词大写
    words = []
    for word in title.split():
        lower_word = word.lower()
        if lower_word in abbreviations:
            words.append(word.upper())  # 保持缩写词大写
        else:
            words.append(word.capitalize())

    return ' '.join(words)

def extract_images_with_positions(article_soup, article_url, content_div=None):
    """
    提取文章中的所有图片及其位置信息

    Args:
        article_soup: BeautifulSoup对象
        article_url: 文章URL（用于解析相对路径）
        content_div: 可选的正文区域，如果为None则搜索整个页面

    Returns:
        list: 图片信息列表，每个元素包含：
            - url: 图片URL
            - index: 图片索引（顺序）
            - context: 上下文信息（前后文本）
            - element: 原始img元素（用于位置标记）
    """
    from urllib.parse import urljoin
    import re

    images = []

    # 决定搜索范围
    if content_div:
        img_elements = content_div.find_all('img')
        search_scope = 'content'
    else:
        img_elements = article_soup.find_all('img')
        search_scope = 'full_page'

    print(f"在{search_scope}范围找到 {len(img_elements)} 个img元素")

    for idx, img in enumerate(img_elements):
        # 提取图片URL
        img_url = None
        for attr in ('src', 'data-src', 'data-lazy-src', 'data-original'):
            url = img.get(attr)
            if url:
                url = url.strip()
                if url and not url.startswith(('data:', 'javascript:', '#')):
                    img_url = urljoin(article_url, url)
                    break

        if not img_url:
            continue

        # 过滤非文章图片
        img_url_lower = img_url.lower()
        exclude_patterns = [
            '/avatar/', '/logo/', '/ad/', '/ads/', '/banner/', '/sponsor/',
            '/widget/', '/icon/', '/favicon', '/social/', '/share/',
            'gravatar.com', 'avatar.jpg', 'logo.png', 'placeholder'
        ]
        if any(pattern in img_url_lower for pattern in exclude_patterns):
            continue

        # 获取上下文信息
        context = ""
        try:
            # 获取前一个文本节点
            prev_elem = img.find_previous_sibling(string=True)
            if prev_elem:
                prev_text = str(prev_elem).strip()[:50]
                if prev_text:
                    context += f"前: {prev_text} "

            # 获取后一个文本节点
            next_elem = img.find_next_sibling(string=True)
            if next_elem:
                next_text = str(next_elem).strip()[:50]
                if next_text:
                    context += f"后: {next_text}"
        except:
            context = "无法获取上下文"

        images.append({
            'url': img_url,
            'index': idx,
            'context': context.strip(),
            'element': img,
            'original_html': str(img)
        })

    print(f"提取到 {len(images)} 张文章图片")
    return images

def mark_image_positions(content_div, images):
    """
    在HTML内容中用占位符标记图片位置

    Args:
        content_div: BeautifulSoup对象（正文区域）
        images: 图片信息列表

    Returns:
        str: 带有图片位置标记的HTML字符串
    """
    # 创建副本以避免修改原始对象
    import copy
    marked_div = copy.copy(content_div)

    # 为每张图片添加唯一占位符
    for img_info in images:
        img = img_info['element']
        # 在marked_div中找到对应的img元素
        # 由于我们复制了div，需要找到相同位置的img
        # 简单方法：用占位符替换
        placeholder = f"{{{{IMAGE_PLACEHOLDER_{img_info['index']}}}}}"
        img.replace_with(placeholder)

    return str(marked_div)

def download_and_replace_images(images, article_title):
    """
    下载图片并生成Obsidian引用

    Args:
        images: 图片信息列表
        article_title: 文章标题（用于创建文件夹）

    Returns:
        list: 本地图片信息列表，包含obsidian_ref
    """
    import os
    import hashlib
    import requests
    from datetime import datetime

    local_images = []

    # 创建文章特定的图片文件夹
    safe_title = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\-]', '', article_title, flags=re.UNICODE)
    safe_title = safe_title.strip()
    if not safe_title:
        safe_title = "未命名文章"
    safe_title = re.sub(r'\s+', '_', safe_title)[:30]

    date_str = datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d")
    title_hash = hashlib.md5(article_title.encode()).hexdigest()[:6]
    article_folder = f"{date_str}_{safe_title}_{title_hash}"

    article_image_dir = os.path.join(IMAGE_SAVE_DIR, article_folder)
    os.makedirs(article_image_dir, exist_ok=True)

    print(f"图片保存目录: {article_image_dir}")

    headers = {'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36'}

    for img_info in images:
        img_url = img_info['url']
        try:
            img_res = requests.get(img_url, headers=headers, timeout=10)
            if img_res.status_code == 200:
                # 生成文件名
                img_hash = hashlib.md5(img_url.encode()).hexdigest()
                content_type = img_res.headers.get('Content-Type', '')
                if 'jpeg' in content_type or 'jpg' in content_type:
                    ext = '.jpg'
                elif 'png' in content_type:
                    ext = '.png'
                elif 'gif' in content_type:
                    ext = '.gif'
                elif 'webp' in content_type:
                    ext = '.webp'
                else:
                    ext = '.jpg'

                filename = f"{img_hash}{ext}"
                local_path = os.path.join(article_image_dir, filename)

                with open(local_path, 'wb') as f:
                    f.write(img_res.content)

                # Obsidian引用路径
                obsidian_ref = f"![[images/byhand/{article_folder}/{filename}]]"

                local_images.append({
                    'url': img_url,
                    'local_path': local_path,
                    'obsidian_ref': obsidian_ref,
                    'index': img_info['index'],
                    'context': img_info['context'],
                    'filename': filename,
                    'placeholder': f"{{{{IMAGE_PLACEHOLDER_{img_info['index']}}}}}"
                })

                print(f"图片下载成功: {filename} (索引: {img_info['index']})")
            else:
                print(f"图片下载失败，状态码 {img_res.status_code}: {img_url}")
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"图片下载失败 {img_url}: {e}")

    # 按索引排序
    local_images.sort(key=lambda x: x['index'])
    return local_images

def main():
    print("开始抓取 AI by Hand 最新文章...")
    
    # 确保目录存在
    os.makedirs(IMAGE_SAVE_DIR, exist_ok=True)
    
    # 1. 获取首页
    headers = {'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36'}
    try:
        # 访问归档页面获取所有文章列表
        resp = requests.get(ARCHIVE_URL, headers=headers, timeout=10)
        resp.encoding = 'utf-8'
        resp.raise_for_status()
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"归档页面请求失败: {e}")
        return 1

    # 2. 解析最新文章链接
    soup = BeautifulSoup(resp.text, 'html.parser')
    article_url = None
    title = None

    # 方法1：正则表达式直接查找完整文章URL
    import re
    # 匹配完整URL格式: https://www.byhand.ai/p/文章slug
    # 但不匹配包含/comments的评论页面
    article_urls = re.findall(r'https://www\.byhand\.ai/p/[^"/\'> ]+(?<!comments)', resp.text)
    # 去重
    unique_urls = []
    seen = set()
    for url in article_urls:
        url = url.rstrip('\\')
        if url not in seen:
            seen.add(url)
            unique_urls.append(url)

    print(f"正则表达式找到 {len(unique_urls)} 个文章URL")
    for url in unique_urls[:5]:
        print(f"   {url}")

    if unique_urls:
        # 选择第一个URL作为最新文章（archive页面按时间顺序排列，最新文章在前）
        article_url = unique_urls[0]
        print(f"选择最新文章URL: {article_url}")
        # 标题为空，稍后从文章页面提取
        title = None
    else:
        # 方法2：BeautifulSoup查找
        article_links = []
        for a in soup.find_all('a', href=True):
            href = a['href']
            if '/p/' in href:
                full_url = urljoin(TARGET_URL, href)
                article_links.append((full_url, a.get_text(strip=True)))

        print(f"BeautifulSoup找到 {len(article_links)} 个文章链接")
        if article_links:
            article_url, title = article_links[0]
            print(f"选择最新文章: {title}")
        else:
            # 方法3：第一个非首页链接
            for a in soup.find_all('a', href=True):
                href = a['href']
                if href.startswith('/') and href != '/':
                    article_url = urljoin(TARGET_URL, href)
                    title = a.get_text(strip=True)
                    break

    if not article_url:
        print("未找到文章链接，网站结构可能已变化")
        return 1
    
    print(f"最新文章: {article_url}")
    print(f"标题: {title}")
    
    # 3. 获取文章页
    try:
        article_resp = requests.get(article_url, headers=headers, timeout=10)
        article_resp.encoding = 'utf-8'
        article_resp.raise_for_status()
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"文章页请求失败: {e}")
        return 1
    
    article_soup = BeautifulSoup(article_resp.text, 'html.parser')

    # 如果标题为空，从文章页面提取标题
    if not title:
        # 尝试多种方法提取文章标题
        title = None

        # 方法1：查找 <title data-rh="true"> 标签（最高优先级）
        title_data_rh = article_soup.find('title', {'data-rh': 'true'})
        if title_data_rh:
            title = title_data_rh.get_text(strip=True)
            print(f"从<title data-rh='true'>提取标题: {title}")

        # 方法2：查找 meta property="og:title"
        if not title:
            og_title = article_soup.find('meta', property='og:title')
            if og_title and og_title.get('content'):
                title = og_title.get('content')
                print(f"从og:title提取标题: {title}")

        # 方法3：查找 title 元素
        if not title:
            title_elem = article_soup.find('title')
            if title_elem:
                title = title_elem.get_text(strip=True)
                print(f"从title提取标题: {title}")

        # 方法4：查找 h1 元素
        if not title:
            h1_elements = article_soup.find_all('h1')
            if h1_elements:
                print(f"找到 {len(h1_elements)} 个 h1 元素:")
                for i, h1 in enumerate(h1_elements):
                    text = h1.get_text(strip=True)
                    print(f"  h1[{i}]: {text}")
            for h1 in h1_elements:
                text = h1.get_text(strip=True)
                if text and len(text) > 5:
                    # 选择最长的h1作为文章标题（通常文章标题更长）
                    if not title or len(text) > len(title):
                        title = text
            if title:
                print(f"从h1选择标题: {title}")

        # 方法5：查找特定类名的标题元素
        if not title:
            for class_name in ['post-title', 'article-title', 'entry-title', 'title']:
                title_elem = article_soup.find(class_=class_name)
                if title_elem:
                    title = title_elem.get_text(strip=True)
                    print(f"从{class_name}类提取标题: {title}")
                    break

        if not title:
            title = "未命名文章"
            print("未找到文章标题，使用默认标题")

    # 4. 提取正文内容
    article_text = ""
    article_md = ""
    md_content = []

    # 方法1：使用 trafilatura 提取内容（如果可用）
    if TRAFILATURA_AVAILABLE:
        try:
            print("尝试使用 trafilatura 提取文章内容...")
            # 下载页面内容
            downloaded = trafilatura.fetch_url(article_url)
            if downloaded:
                # 提取markdown格式内容
                article_md = trafilatura.extract(downloaded, output_format='markdown')
                if article_md:
                    print("trafilatura 成功提取markdown格式内容")
                    # 提取纯文本用于摘要
                    article_text = trafilatura.extract(downloaded, output_format='txt')
                    # 将markdown内容分割为段落
                    md_content = [para + "\n\n" for para in article_md.split('\n\n') if para.strip()]
                else:
                    print("trafilatura 提取markdown内容失败，尝试文本格式")
                    article_text = trafilatura.extract(downloaded, output_format='txt')
                    if article_text:
                        print("trafilatura 成功提取文本格式内容")
                        md_content = [para + "\n\n" for para in article_text.split('\n\n') if para.strip()]
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"trafilatura 提取失败: {e}")
            # 重置变量以确保使用备用方法
            article_md = ""
            article_text = ""
            md_content = []

    # 方法2：如果 trafilatura 不可用或提取失败，使用 BeautifulSoup 备用方法
    if not md_content and not article_text:
        print("使用 BeautifulSoup 备用方法提取内容...")
        content_div = None
        # 尝试多种选择器
        selectors = [
            {'name': 'div[class*="post-content"]', 'func': lambda s: s.find('div', class_=re.compile(r'post-content'))},
            {'name': 'div[class*="content"]', 'func': lambda s: s.find('div', class_=re.compile(r'content'))},
            {'name': 'div[class*="article"]', 'func': lambda s: s.find('div', class_=re.compile(r'article'))},
            {'name': 'div[class*="entry"]', 'func': lambda s: s.find('div', class_=re.compile(r'entry'))},
            {'name': 'article', 'func': lambda s: s.find('article')},
            {'name': 'div[class*="body"]', 'func': lambda s: s.find('div', class_=re.compile(r'body'))},
            {'name': 'main', 'func': lambda s: s.find('main')},
            {'name': 'body', 'func': lambda s: s.find('body')},
        ]

        for selector in selectors:
            content_div = selector['func'](article_soup)
            if content_div:
                print(f"使用选择器 {selector['name']} 找到正文区域")
                break

        if not content_div:
            print("无法提取正文")
            return 1

        # 5. 提取图片信息（使用新方法）
        print("提取图片信息...")
        images = extract_images_with_positions(article_soup, article_url, content_div)

        # 6. 下载图片
        local_images = []
        if images:
            local_images = download_and_replace_images(images, title)
            print(f"下载了 {len(local_images)} 张图片")

        # 7. 生成带图片位置的Markdown内容
        print("生成Markdown内容...")
        md_content = []

        # 使用占位符标记图片位置，然后转换为markdown
        if images and local_images:
            # 创建图片占位符映射
            placeholder_map = {}
            for img_info in local_images:
                placeholder_map[img_info['placeholder']] = img_info['obsidian_ref']

            # 用占位符替换图片元素
            for img_info in images:
                img = img_info['element']
                placeholder = img_info['placeholder'] = f"{{{{IMAGE_PLACEHOLDER_{img_info['index']}}}}}"
                img.replace_with(f"\n\n{placeholder}\n\n")

        # 提取所有文本内容（包括占位符）
        # 遍历所有段落和文本节点
        for element in content_div.descendants:
            if element.name is None:  # 文本节点
                text = str(element).strip()
                if text:
                    md_content.append(text + "\n\n")
            elif element.name == 'p':
                text = element.get_text(strip=True)
                if text:
                    md_content.append(text + "\n\n")
            elif element.name in ['h1', 'h2', 'h3', 'h4', 'h5', 'h6']:
                level = int(element.name[1])
                heading_text = element.get_text(strip=True)
                if heading_text:
                    md_content.append(f"{'#' * level} {heading_text}\n\n")
            elif element.name == 'li':
                text = element.get_text(strip=True)
                if text:
                    md_content.append(f"- {text}\n\n")
            elif element.name in ['ul', 'ol', 'div', 'span']:
                # 这些元素已经通过后代处理，跳过
                pass

        # 提取纯文本用于摘要
        article_text = content_div.get_text()
        print(f"提取到 {len(md_content)} 个markdown段落")

    # 6. 生成摘要
    if article_text:
        summary = article_text[:SUMMARY_LENGTH] + "..." if len(article_text) > SUMMARY_LENGTH else article_text
    elif md_content:
        # 从md_content生成摘要文本
        summary_text = " ".join([para.strip() for para in md_content[:3]])
        summary = summary_text[:SUMMARY_LENGTH] + "..." if len(summary_text) > SUMMARY_LENGTH else summary_text
    else:
        summary = "无法提取文章内容"
    
    # 8. 保存笔记
    safe_title = re.sub(r'[\\/*?:"<>|]', "", title)[:50]  # 限制长度
    today = datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d")
    filename = f"{today}-{safe_title}.md"
    filepath = os.path.join(OBSIDIAN_VAULT, filename)
    
    note = f"""---
title: {title}
date: {today}
source: {article_url}
---

# {title}

##  摘要
{summary}

##  正文
{''.join(md_content)}
"""
    with open(filepath, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        f.write(note)
    
    print(f"笔记已生成: {filepath}")
    
    # 输出给 Claude 的结果（会被捕获）
    print(f"RESULT_FILE={filepath}")
    return 0

if __name__ == "__main__":
    sys.exit(main())

#!/usr/bin/env python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""
byhand-digest 技能的核心抓取脚本
由 Claude Code 按需调用，执行时不占用主会话上下文
"""

import os
import re
import sys
import requests
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup
from datetime import datetime
from urllib.parse import urljoin
import hashlib
from pathlib import Path
try:
    import trafilatura
    TRAFILATURA_AVAILABLE = True
except ImportError:
    TRAFILATURA_AVAILABLE = False
    print("警告: trafilatura 库未安装，使用备用方法提取内容")
    print("请运行: pip install trafilatura")

# ===== 配置 =====
TARGET_URL = "https://www.byhand.ai/"
ARCHIVE_URL = "https://www.byhand.ai/archive"   # 归档页面，包含所有文章
OBSIDIAN_VAULT = r"E:\Obsidian Vault"           # 用户指定的目录
IMAGE_SAVE_DIR = os.path.join(OBSIDIAN_VAULT, "images", "byhand")
SUMMARY_LENGTH = 300

def extract_title_from_url(url_path):
    """
    从URL路径中提取文章标题
    例如: /p/ppo-clipped-policy-loss-algorithm -> "PPO Clipped Policy Loss Algorithm"
    """
    if not url_path:
        return None

    # 提取/p/之后的部分
    if '/p/' in url_path:
        slug = url_path.split('/p/')[-1]
    else:
        slug = url_path.split('/')[-1]

    # 去除可能的查询参数和末尾斜杠
    slug = slug.split('?')[0].rstrip('/')

    # 将连字符替换为空格
    title = slug.replace('-', ' ')

    # 常见缩写词列表，保持大写
    abbreviations = ['ppo', 'ai', 'rl', 'ml', 'dl', 'nlp', 'cv', 'gan',
                     'transformer', 'bert', 'gpt', 'lstm', 'cnn', 'rnn',
                     'huggingface', 'openai', 'anthropic', 'deepseek',
                     'llm', 'vlm', 'moe', 'mha', 'ffn', 'relu', 'adam',
                     'sgd', 'svm', 'knn', 'pca', 't-sne', 'umap', 'tsne']

    # 将每个单词的首字母大写，但保持缩写词大写
    words = []
    for word in title.split():
        lower_word = word.lower()
        if lower_word in abbreviations:
            words.append(word.upper())  # 保持缩写词大写
        else:
            words.append(word.capitalize())

    return ' '.join(words)

def extract_images_with_positions(article_soup, article_url, content_div=None):
    """
    提取文章中的所有图片及其位置信息

    Args:
        article_soup: BeautifulSoup对象
        article_url: 文章URL（用于解析相对路径）
        content_div: 可选的正文区域，如果为None则搜索整个页面

    Returns:
        list: 图片信息列表，每个元素包含：
            - url: 图片URL
            - index: 图片索引（顺序）
            - context: 上下文信息（前后文本）
            - element: 原始img元素（用于位置标记）
    """
    from urllib.parse import urljoin
    import re

    images = []

    # 决定搜索范围
    if content_div:
        img_elements = content_div.find_all('img')
        search_scope = 'content'
    else:
        img_elements = article_soup.find_all('img')
        search_scope = 'full_page'

    print(f"在{search_scope}范围找到 {len(img_elements)} 个img元素")

    for idx, img in enumerate(img_elements):
        # 提取图片URL
        img_url = None
        for attr in ('src', 'data-src', 'data-lazy-src', 'data-original'):
            url = img.get(attr)
            if url:
                url = url.strip()
                if url and not url.startswith(('data:', 'javascript:', '#')):
                    img_url = urljoin(article_url, url)
                    break

        if not img_url:
            continue

        # 过滤非文章图片
        img_url_lower = img_url.lower()
        exclude_patterns = [
            '/avatar/', '/logo/', '/ad/', '/ads/', '/banner/', '/sponsor/',
            '/widget/', '/icon/', '/favicon', '/social/', '/share/',
            'gravatar.com', 'avatar.jpg', 'logo.png', 'placeholder'
        ]
        if any(pattern in img_url_lower for pattern in exclude_patterns):
            continue

        # 获取上下文信息
        context = ""
        try:
            # 获取前一个文本节点
            prev_elem = img.find_previous_sibling(string=True)
            if prev_elem:
                prev_text = str(prev_elem).strip()[:50]
                if prev_text:
                    context += f"前: {prev_text} "

            # 获取后一个文本节点
            next_elem = img.find_next_sibling(string=True)
            if next_elem:
                next_text = str(next_elem).strip()[:50]
                if next_text:
                    context += f"后: {next_text}"
        except:
            context = "无法获取上下文"

        images.append({
            'url': img_url,
            'index': idx,
            'context': context.strip(),
            'element': img,
            'original_html': str(img)
        })

    print(f"提取到 {len(images)} 张文章图片")
    return images

def mark_image_positions(content_div, images):
    """
    在HTML内容中用占位符标记图片位置

    Args:
        content_div: BeautifulSoup对象（正文区域）
        images: 图片信息列表

    Returns:
        str: 带有图片位置标记的HTML字符串
    """
    # 创建副本以避免修改原始对象
    import copy
    marked_div = copy.copy(content_div)

    # 为每张图片添加唯一占位符
    for img_info in images:
        img = img_info['element']
        # 在marked_div中找到对应的img元素
        # 由于我们复制了div，需要找到相同位置的img
        # 简单方法：用占位符替换
        placeholder = f"{{{{IMAGE_PLACEHOLDER_{img_info['index']}}}}}"
        img.replace_with(placeholder)

    return str(marked_div)

def download_and_replace_images(images, article_title):
    """
    下载图片并生成Obsidian引用

    Args:
        images: 图片信息列表
        article_title: 文章标题（用于创建文件夹）

    Returns:
        list: 本地图片信息列表，包含obsidian_ref
    """
    import os
    import hashlib
    import requests
    from datetime import datetime

    local_images = []

    # 创建文章特定的图片文件夹
    safe_title = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\-]', '', article_title, flags=re.UNICODE)
    safe_title = safe_title.strip()
    if not safe_title:
        safe_title = "未命名文章"
    safe_title = re.sub(r'\s+', '_', safe_title)[:30]

    date_str = datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d")
    title_hash = hashlib.md5(article_title.encode()).hexdigest()[:6]
    article_folder = f"{date_str}_{safe_title}_{title_hash}"

    article_image_dir = os.path.join(IMAGE_SAVE_DIR, article_folder)
    os.makedirs(article_image_dir, exist_ok=True)

    print(f"图片保存目录: {article_image_dir}")

    headers = {'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36'}

    for img_info in images:
        img_url = img_info['url']
        try:
            img_res = requests.get(img_url, headers=headers, timeout=10)
            if img_res.status_code == 200:
                # 生成文件名
                img_hash = hashlib.md5(img_url.encode()).hexdigest()
                content_type = img_res.headers.get('Content-Type', '')
                if 'jpeg' in content_type or 'jpg' in content_type:
                    ext = '.jpg'
                elif 'png' in content_type:
                    ext = '.png'
                elif 'gif' in content_type:
                    ext = '.gif'
                elif 'webp' in content_type:
                    ext = '.webp'
                else:
                    ext = '.jpg'

                filename = f"{img_hash}{ext}"
                local_path = os.path.join(article_image_dir, filename)

                with open(local_path, 'wb') as f:
                    f.write(img_res.content)

                # Obsidian引用路径
                obsidian_ref = f"![[images/byhand/{article_folder}/{filename}]]"

                local_images.append({
                    'url': img_url,
                    'local_path': local_path,
                    'obsidian_ref': obsidian_ref,
                    'index': img_info['index'],
                    'context': img_info['context'],
                    'filename': filename,
                    'placeholder': f"{{{{IMAGE_PLACEHOLDER_{img_info['index']}}}}}"
                })

                print(f"图片下载成功: {filename} (索引: {img_info['index']})")
            else:
                print(f"图片下载失败，状态码 {img_res.status_code}: {img_url}")
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"图片下载失败 {img_url}: {e}")

    # 按索引排序
    local_images.sort(key=lambda x: x['index'])
    return local_images

def main():
    print("开始抓取 AI by Hand 最新文章...")
    
    # 确保目录存在
    os.makedirs(IMAGE_SAVE_DIR, exist_ok=True)
    
    # 1. 获取首页
    headers = {'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36'}
    try:
        # 访问归档页面获取所有文章列表
        resp = requests.get(ARCHIVE_URL, headers=headers, timeout=10)
        resp.encoding = 'utf-8'
        resp.raise_for_status()
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"归档页面请求失败: {e}")
        return 1

    # 2. 解析最新文章链接
    soup = BeautifulSoup(resp.text, 'html.parser')
    article_url = None
    title = None

    # 方法1：正则表达式直接查找完整文章URL
    import re
    # 匹配完整URL格式: https://www.byhand.ai/p/文章slug
    # 但不匹配包含/comments的评论页面
    article_urls = re.findall(r'https://www\.byhand\.ai/p/[^"/\'> ]+(?<!comments)', resp.text)
    # 去重
    unique_urls = []
    seen = set()
    for url in article_urls:
        url = url.rstrip('\\')
        if url not in seen:
            seen.add(url)
            unique_urls.append(url)

    print(f"正则表达式找到 {len(unique_urls)} 个文章URL")
    for url in unique_urls[:5]:
        print(f"   {url}")

    if unique_urls:
        # 选择第一个URL作为最新文章（archive页面按时间顺序排列，最新文章在前）
        article_url = unique_urls[0]
        print(f"选择最新文章URL: {article_url}")
        # 标题为空，稍后从文章页面提取
        title = None
    else:
        # 方法2：BeautifulSoup查找
        article_links = []
        for a in soup.find_all('a', href=True):
            href = a['href']
            if '/p/' in href:
                full_url = urljoin(TARGET_URL, href)
                article_links.append((full_url, a.get_text(strip=True)))

        print(f"BeautifulSoup找到 {len(article_links)} 个文章链接")
        if article_links:
            article_url, title = article_links[0]
            print(f"选择最新文章: {title}")
        else:
            # 方法3：第一个非首页链接
            for a in soup.find_all('a', href=True):
                href = a['href']
                if href.startswith('/') and href != '/':
                    article_url = urljoin(TARGET_URL, href)
                    title = a.get_text(strip=True)
                    break

    if not article_url:
        print("未找到文章链接，网站结构可能已变化")
        return 1
    
    print(f"最新文章: {article_url}")
    print(f"标题: {title}")
    
    # 3. 获取文章页
    try:
        article_resp = requests.get(article_url, headers=headers, timeout=10)
        article_resp.encoding = 'utf-8'
        article_resp.raise_for_status()
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"文章页请求失败: {e}")
        return 1
    
    article_soup = BeautifulSoup(article_resp.text, 'html.parser')

    # 如果标题为空，从文章页面提取标题
    if not title:
        # 尝试多种方法提取文章标题
        title = None

        # 方法1：查找 <title data-rh="true"> 标签（最高优先级）
        title_data_rh = article_soup.find('title', {'data-rh': 'true'})
        if title_data_rh:
            title = title_data_rh.get_text(strip=True)
            print(f"从<title data-rh='true'>提取标题: {title}")

        # 方法2：查找 meta property="og:title"
        if not title:
            og_title = article_soup.find('meta', property='og:title')
            if og_title and og_title.get('content'):
                title = og_title.get('content')
                print(f"从og:title提取标题: {title}")

        # 方法3：查找 title 元素
        if not title:
            title_elem = article_soup.find('title')
            if title_elem:
                title = title_elem.get_text(strip=True)
                print(f"从title提取标题: {title}")

        # 方法4：查找 h1 元素
        if not title:
            h1_elements = article_soup.find_all('h1')
            if h1_elements:
                print(f"找到 {len(h1_elements)} 个 h1 元素:")
                for i, h1 in enumerate(h1_elements):
                    text = h1.get_text(strip=True)
                    print(f"  h1[{i}]: {text}")
            for h1 in h1_elements:
                text = h1.get_text(strip=True)
                if text and len(text) > 5:
                    # 选择最长的h1作为文章标题（通常文章标题更长）
                    if not title or len(text) > len(title):
                        title = text
            if title:
                print(f"从h1选择标题: {title}")

        # 方法5：查找特定类名的标题元素
        if not title:
            for class_name in ['post-title', 'article-title', 'entry-title', 'title']:
                title_elem = article_soup.find(class_=class_name)
                if title_elem:
                    title = title_elem.get_text(strip=True)
                    print(f"从{class_name}类提取标题: {title}")
                    break

        if not title:
            title = "未命名文章"
            print("未找到文章标题，使用默认标题")

    # 4. 提取正文内容
    article_text = ""
    article_md = ""
    md_content = []

    # 方法1：使用 trafilatura 提取内容（如果可用）
    images = []  # 初始化images变量，两种方法都会用到
    local_images = []  # 初始化local_images变量
    if TRAFILATURA_AVAILABLE:
        try:
            print("尝试使用 trafilatura 提取文章内容...")
            # 下载页面内容
            downloaded = trafilatura.fetch_url(article_url)
            if downloaded:
                # 提取markdown格式内容
                article_md = trafilatura.extract(downloaded, output_format='markdown')
                if article_md:
                    print("trafilatura 成功提取markdown格式内容")
                    # 提取纯文本用于摘要
                    article_text = trafilatura.extract(downloaded, output_format='txt')
                    # 将markdown内容分割为段落
                    md_content = [para + "\n\n" for para in article_md.split('\n\n') if para.strip()]

                    # 同时使用BeautifulSoup提取图片信息
                    print("使用BeautifulSoup提取图片信息...")
                    # 找到正文区域用于图片提取
                    content_div = None
                    selectors = [
                        {'name': 'div[class*="post-content"]', 'func': lambda s: s.find('div', class_=re.compile(r'post-content'))},
                        {'name': 'div[class*="content"]', 'func': lambda s: s.find('div', class_=re.compile(r'content'))},
                        {'name': 'div[class*="article"]', 'func': lambda s: s.find('div', class_=re.compile(r'article'))},
                        {'name': 'div[class*="entry"]', 'func': lambda s: s.find('div', class_=re.compile(r'entry'))},
                        {'name': 'article', 'func': lambda s: s.find('article')},
                        {'name': 'div[class*="body"]', 'func': lambda s: s.find('div', class_=re.compile(r'body'))},
                        {'name': 'main', 'func': lambda s: s.find('main')},
                        {'name': 'body', 'func': lambda s: s.find('body')},
                    ]

                    for selector in selectors:
                        content_div = selector['func'](article_soup)
                        if content_div:
                            print(f"使用选择器 {selector['name']} 找到正文区域用于图片提取")
                            break

                    if content_div:
                        images = extract_images_with_positions(article_soup, article_url, content_div)
                        if images:
                            local_images = download_and_replace_images(images, title)
                            print(f"下载了 {len(local_images)} 张图片")

                            # 在markdown内容中替换图片URL为本地引用
                            # 创建URL到本地引用的映射
                            url_to_ref = {img['url']: img['obsidian_ref'] for img in local_images}

                            # 替换markdown内容中的图片链接
                            for i in range(len(md_content)):
                                paragraph = md_content[i]
                                for img_url, obsidian_ref in url_to_ref.items():
                                    # 查找markdown图片语法 ![alt](url)
                                    pattern = rf'!\[.*?\]\({re.escape(img_url)}\)'
                                    paragraph = re.sub(pattern, obsidian_ref, paragraph)
                                md_content[i] = paragraph

                else:
                    print("trafilatura 提取markdown内容失败，尝试文本格式")
                    article_text = trafilatura.extract(downloaded, output_format='txt')
                    if article_text:
                        print("trafilatura 成功提取文本格式内容")
                        md_content = [para + "\n\n" for para in article_text.split('\n\n') if para.strip()]
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"trafilatura 提取失败: {e}")
            # 重置变量以确保使用备用方法
            article_md = ""
            article_text = ""
            md_content = []
            images = []
            local_images = []

    # 方法2：如果 trafilatura 不可用或提取失败，使用 BeautifulSoup 备用方法
    if not md_content and not article_text:
        print("使用 BeautifulSoup 备用方法提取内容...")
        content_div = None
        # 尝试多种选择器
        selectors = [
            {'name': 'div[class*="post-content"]', 'func': lambda s: s.find('div', class_=re.compile(r'post-content'))},
            {'name': 'div[class*="content"]', 'func': lambda s: s.find('div', class_=re.compile(r'content'))},
            {'name': 'div[class*="article"]', 'func': lambda s: s.find('div', class_=re.compile(r'article'))},
            {'name': 'div[class*="entry"]', 'func': lambda s: s.find('div', class_=re.compile(r'entry'))},
            {'name': 'article', 'func': lambda s: s.find('article')},
            {'name': 'div[class*="body"]', 'func': lambda s: s.find('div', class_=re.compile(r'body'))},
            {'name': 'main', 'func': lambda s: s.find('main')},
            {'name': 'body', 'func': lambda s: s.find('body')},
        ]

        for selector in selectors:
            content_div = selector['func'](article_soup)
            if content_div:
                print(f"使用选择器 {selector['name']} 找到正文区域")
                break

        if not content_div:
            print("无法提取正文")
            return 1

        # 5. 提取图片信息（使用新方法）
        print("提取图片信息...")
        images = extract_images_with_positions(article_soup, article_url, content_div)

        # 6. 下载图片
        local_images = []
        if images:
            local_images = download_and_replace_images(images, title)
            print(f"下载了 {len(local_images)} 张图片")

        # 7. 生成带图片位置的Markdown内容
        print("生成Markdown内容...")
        md_content = []

        # 使用占位符标记图片位置，然后转换为markdown
        if images and local_images:
            # 创建图片占位符映射
            placeholder_map = {}
            for img_info in local_images:
                placeholder_map[img_info['placeholder']] = img_info['obsidian_ref']

            # 用占位符替换图片元素
            for img_info in images:
                img = img_info['element']
                placeholder = img_info['placeholder'] = f"{{{{IMAGE_PLACEHOLDER_{img_info['index']}}}}}"
                img.replace_with(f"\n\n{placeholder}\n\n")

        # 提取所有文本内容（包括占位符）
        # 遍历所有段落和文本节点
        for element in content_div.descendants:
            if element.name is None:  # 文本节点
                text = str(element).strip()
                if text:
                    md_content.append(text + "\n\n")
            elif element.name == 'p':
                text = element.get_text(strip=True)
                if text:
                    md_content.append(text + "\n\n")
            elif element.name in ['h1', 'h2', 'h3', 'h4', 'h5', 'h6']:
                level = int(element.name[1])
                heading_text = element.get_text(strip=True)
                if heading_text:
                    md_content.append(f"{'#' * level} {heading_text}\n\n")
            elif element.name == 'li':
                text = element.get_text(strip=True)
                if text:
                    md_content.append(f"- {text}\n\n")
            elif element.name in ['ul', 'ol', 'div', 'span']:
                # 这些元素已经通过后代处理，跳过
                pass

        # 提取纯文本用于摘要
        article_text = content_div.get_text()
        print(f"提取到 {len(md_content)} 个markdown段落")

    # 6. 生成摘要
    if article_text:
        summary = article_text[:SUMMARY_LENGTH] + "..." if len(article_text) > SUMMARY_LENGTH else article_text
    elif md_content:
        # 从md_content生成摘要文本
        summary_text = " ".join([para.strip() for para in md_content[:3]])
        summary = summary_text[:SUMMARY_LENGTH] + "..." if len(summary_text) > SUMMARY_LENGTH else summary_text
    else:
        summary = "无法提取文章内容"
    
    # 8. 保存笔记
    safe_title = re.sub(r'[\\/*?:"<>|]', "", title)[:50]  # 限制长度
    today = datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d")
    filename = f"{today}-{safe_title}.md"
    filepath = os.path.join(OBSIDIAN_VAULT, filename)
    
    note = f"""---
title: {title}
date: {today}
source: {article_url}
---

# {title}

##  摘要
{summary}

##  正文
{''.join(md_content)}
"""
    with open(filepath, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        f.write(note)
    
    print(f"笔记已生成: {filepath}")
    
    # 输出给 Claude 的结果（会被捕获）
    print(f"RESULT_FILE={filepath}")
    return 0

if __name__ == "__main__":
    sys.exit(main())
